The user wants to gather exact evidence before editing schema definitions, ensuring versioning. They have been expanding file and hydrating source. The heuristic suggests expand_file [F1] priority=112 candidates=17. So we should execute session.expand_file with target selector for artifacts.rs perhaps. Use short id? So we should issue a tool call: session.expand_file with target_selector maybe "crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs". Use short id? So payload: {"target":"crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs"} maybe with depth etc. Let's use default parameters? Thus tool_call name: session.expand_file, payload: {"target":"crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs"}.
